word.tr_en: to hit (a person); to strike; to beat

phrase.ph: タイプを【打：ぶ】つ
phrase.rem: old-fashioned; verified with ChatGPT that this mostly refers to typewriters; jisho has n4 for taipu, but in a different sense

phrase.ph: ぶつかる

sentence.s: 【石：いし】【川：かわ】さんは【山：やま】【田：だ】さんをぶちました。
sentence.rom: Ishikawa-san wa Yamada-san o buchimashita.
sentence.tr_en: Mr Ishikawa hit Mr Yamada.
sentence.tr_de: Herr Ishikawa hat Herrn Yamada geschlagen.

sentence.s: 【山：やま】【田：だ】さんは【石：いし】【川：かわ】さんにぶたれました。
sentence.rom: Yamada-san wa Ishikawa-san ni butaremashita.
sentence.tr_en: Mr Yamada was hit by Mr Ishikawa.
sentence.tr_de: Herr Yamada wurde von Herrn Ishikawa geschlagen.
sentence.explanation_en: 「ぶたれる」is the passive form of「ぶつ」
sentence.explanation_de: 「ぶたれる」ist die passive Form von「ぶつ」

word.tr_en: to give sb. a treat; to pay for sb.
word.tr_de: jem. eine Freude machen; für jem. bezahlen
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.94 vocab section; jisho has n1

sentence.s: おごりたいのですが。
sentence.rom: Ogoritai no desu ga.
sentence.tr_en: I would like to pay for us.
sentence.tr_de: Ich möchte Sie einladen.

sentence.s: 【一：いっ】【杯：ぱい】【奢：おご】りましょうか。
sentence.rom: Ippai ogorimashō ka?
sentence.tr_en: May I invite you to a drink?
sentence.tr_de: Darf ich Sie zu einem Drink einladen?

word.tr_en: to fall behind; to be inferior to

phrase.ph: 【誰：だれ】にも【劣：おと】らない

sentence.s: この【点：てん】で【私：わたし】は【彼：かれ】に【劣：おと】る。
sentence.rom: Kono ten de watashi wa kare ni otoru.
sentence.tr_en: I fall behind him in this respect.
sentence.tr_de: Ich bin ihm in diesem Punkt unterlegen.
sentence.rem: verified with ChatGPT; このことについて would be grammatically correct, but not idiomatic

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】は【物：ぶつ】【理：り】では【誰：だれ】にも【劣：おと】らない。
sentence.rom: Kare wa butsuri de wa dare ni mo otoranai.
sentence.tr_en: He is second to none in physics.
sentence.tr_de: In Physik steht er niemandem nach.
sentence.rem: verified with ChatGPT; 物理学 would also be correct, but 物理 is fine for casual speech

word.tr_en: to lead to (a place); to arrive at (a decision); to reach (a stage)

sentence.s: この【道：みち】は【公：こう】【園：えん】に【至：いた】る。
sentence.rom: Kono michi wa kōen ni itaru.
sentence.tr_en: This road goes to the park.
sentence.tr_de: Dieser Weg führt zum Park.

word.tr_en: to snatch sth. away; to deprive sb. of sth.

phrase.ph: 【心：こころ】を【奪：うば】う
【自：じ】【由：ゆう】を【奪：うば】う
phrase.tr_en: to deprive so. of their freedom

phrase.ph: 【時：じ】【間：かん】を【奪：うば】う
phrase.tr_en: to steal someone's time; to take time

sentence.s: 【財：さい】【布：ふ】を【奪：うば】われた。
sentence.rom: Saifu o ubawareta.
sentence.tr_en: My purse was taken from me.
sentence.tr_de: Mein Geldbeutel wurde mir weggeschnappt.

sentence.s: 【仕：し】【事：ごと】が【私：わたし】の【時：じ】【間：かん】を【奪：うば】っている。
sentence.rom: Shigoto ga watashi no jikan o ubatte iru.
sentence.tr_en: Work is stealing my time.
sentence.tr_de: Die Arbeit klaut mir die ganze Zeit weg.

sentence.s: その【新：あたら】しい【法：ほう】【律：りつ】が【市：し】【民：みん】から【自：じ】【由：ゆう】を【奪：うば】った。
sentence.rom: Sono atarashii hōritsu ga shimin kara jiyū o ubatta.
sentence.tr_en: The new law has deprived the citizens of their liberty.
sentence.tr_de: Das neue Gesetz hat den Bürgern ihre Freiheit entzogen.

word.tr_en: to make (money); to score (points); to work hard

phrase.ph: たくさん【稼：かせ】ぐ
phrase.tr_en: to make a lot of money
phrase.rem: lib0 has おおいに稼ぐ, but ChatGPT says 大いに稼ぐ is stiff and old-fashioned

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】は【私：わたし】の【三：さん】【倍：ばい】も【稼：かせ】ぐ。
sentence.rom: Kare wa watashi no san-bai mo kasegu.
sentence.tr_en: He earns three times as much as I.
sentence.tr_de: Er verdient dreimal soviel wie ich.

word.tr_en: to obey; to follow (a rule); to conform to

phrase.ph: 【両：りょう】【親：しん】に【従：したが】う

sentence.s: 【従：したが】うより【仕：し】【方：かた】はない。
sentence.rom: Shitagau yori shikata wa nai.
sentence.tr_en: There is nothing for it but to comply.
sentence.tr_de: Es gibt keine andere Wahl, als sich zu fügen.

sentence.s: 【法：ほう】【律：りつ】には【従：したが】うべきですよ。
sentence.rom: Hōritsu ni wa shitagau-beki desu yo.
sentence.tr_en: One ought to obey the law, you know.
sentence.tr_de: Man muss dem Gesetz gehorchen.
sentence.explanation_en: The suffix べき after a verb has the meaning of 'one have to'.
sentence.explanation_de: Die Endung べき nach einem Verb hat die Bedeutung von 'man muss'.

word.tr_en: to state sth.; to express sth.; to mention

phrase.ph: 【自：じ】【分：ぶん】の【経：けい】【験：けん】を【述：の】べる

sentence.s: 【自：じ】【由：ゆう】に【意：い】【見：けん】を【述：の】べてください。
sentence.rom: Jiyū ni iken o nobete kudasai.
sentence.tr_en: Please state your opinion freely.
sentence.tr_de: Bitte drücken Sie offen Ihre Meinung aus.
sentence.explanation_en: For a less formal tone, you could use the verb 【伝：つた】える.
sentence.explanation_de: Für einen weniger formellen Ton könnte man auch das Verb 【伝：つた】える verwenden.
sentence.rem: verified with ChatGPT; also natural, less formal: 自由に意見を伝えてください

word.tr_en: to accept (an offer); to satisfy (a request)

phrase.ph: 【招：しょう】【待：たい】に【応：おう】じる
【頼：たの】みに【応：おう】じる
【提：てい】【案：あん】に【応：おう】じる
phrase.tr_en: to go along with a proposal

sentence.s: 【高：たか】【橋：はし】さんは【私：わたし】たちの【求：もと】めに【応：おう】じて、【歌：うた】ってくださいました。
sentence.rom: Takahashi-san wa watashi-tachi no motome ni ōjite, utatte kudasaimashita.
sentence.tr_en: Miss Takahashi satisfied our request and sang for us.
sentence.tr_de: Frau Takahashi erfüllte unseren Wunsch und sang für uns.

word.tr_en: to bring to sb.'s attention; to complain; to sue so.
word.tr_de: auf etw. aufmerksam machen; sich beklagen; jem. verklagen

phrase.ph: 【頭：ず】【痛：つう】を【訴：うった】える
【工：こう】【事：じ】【現：げん】【場：ば】の【騒：そう】【音：おん】を【訴：うった】える
phrase.tr_en: to complain about the construction site's noise
phrase.tr_de: sich über den Lärm der Bauarbeiten beklagen

sentence.s: ヨシは【宝：ほう】【石：せき】を【盗：ぬす】んだとして【訴：うった】えられました。
sentence.rom: Yoshi wa hōseki o nusunda to shite uttaeraremashita.
sentence.tr_en: Yoshi was accused of having stolen the jewels.
sentence.tr_de: Yoshi wurde angeklagt, die Juwelen gestohlen zu haben.

word.tr_en: to be grounded on; to be based on; to originate from
word.tr_de: in etw. gegründet sein; auf etw. basieren; von etw. abstammen

phrase.ph: 【経：けい】【験：けん】に【基：もと】づいている

sentence.s: この【話：はなし】は【事：じ】【実：じつ】に【基：もと】づいています。
sentence.rom: Kono hanashi wa jijitsu ni motodzuite imasu.
sentence.tr_en: This story is based on facts.
sentence.tr_de: Diese Geschichte basiert auf wahren Fakten.

word.tr_en: to become full (of); to be filled (with)

phrase.ph: 【喜：よろこ】びに【満：み】ちている
【幸：しあわ】せに【満：み】ちた【家：か】【庭：てい】

sentence.s: その【本：ほん】は【冒：ぼう】【険：けん】に【満：み】ちている。
sentence.rom: Sono hon wa bōken ni michite iru.
sentence.tr_en: That book is full of adventure.
sentence.tr_de: Das Buch ist voll von Abenteuer.

sentence.s: 【花：はな】の【香：かお】りが【部：へ】【屋：や】に【満：み】ちている。
sentence.rom: Hana no kaori ga heya ni michite iru.
sentence.tr_en: The scent of flowers fills the room.
sentence.tr_de: Der Duft von Blumen füllt den Raum.
sentence.rem: verified with ChatGPT; also possible: 部屋は花の香りに満ちている

word.tr_en: to approve sth.; to tolerate sth.; to forgive sth.
word.tr_de: etw. gutheissen; etw. tolerieren; etw. vergeben

phrase.ph: 【失：しっ】【敗：ぱい】を【許：ゆる】す

sentence.s: そのことは【許：ゆる】せない。
sentence.rom: Sono koto wa yurusenai.
sentence.tr_en: I can't tolerate this kind of thing.
sentence.tr_de: Ich kann diese Sache nicht gutheissen.
sentence.rem: ChatGPT insists that yurusu means 'forgive', which disagrees with jisho, lib0, Doraemon

word.tr_en: to hand over; to give up

phrase.ph: おじいさんに【席：せき】を【譲：ゆず】る
phrase.tr_en: to give up one's seat to an elderly man
phrase.tr_de: den Sitzplatz einem älteren Herrn überlassen

sentence.s: 【妹：いもうと】がバスでおばあちゃんに【席：せき】を【譲：ゆず】ってあげました。
sentence.rom: Imōto ga basu de o-bāchan ni seki o yuzutte agemashita.
sentence.tr_en: My younger sister gave her seat to an old lady on the bus.
sentence.tr_de: Meine jüngere Schwester hat ihren Sitzplatz einer älteren Dame gegeben.

sentence.s: 【彼：かれ】は【一：いっ】【歩：ぽ】も【譲：ゆず】らない。
sentence.rom: Kare wa ippo mo yuzuranai.
sentence.tr_en: He won't budge an inch.
sentence.tr_de: Er gibt keinen Millimeter nach.

word.tr_en: to indicate; to signify; to represent
word.tr_de: etw. anzeigen; etw. bedeuten; etw. repräsentieren

phrase.ph: 【以：い】【下：か】に【示：しめ】す【通：とお】り
ホテルの【場：ば】【所：しょ】を【地：ち】【図：ず】で【示：しめ】す
phrase.rom: hoteru no basho o chizu de shimesu
phrase.tr_en: to point at the location of the hotel on the map
phrase.tr_de: den Ort des Hotels auf der Karte (mit dem Finger) zeigen

sentence.s: 【地：ち】【図：ず】の【赤：あか】【丸：まる】は【学：がっ】【校：こう】を【示：しめ】す。
sentence.rom: Chizu no akamaru wa gakkō o shimesu.
sentence.tr_en: Red circles on the map mark schools.
sentence.tr_de: Die roten Kreise auf der Karte markieren Schulen.

word.tr_en: to measure; to weigh
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.329 kanji section; jisho used to rate this n2, but now it's n3

phrase.ph: 【体：たい】【温：おん】を【計：はか】る

word.tr_en: to keep in custody; to be put in charge of
word.Langenscheidt: aufbewahren, für eine Sache verantwortlich sein
word.rem: appears in GENKI2 p.91; jisho has n2

sentence.s: 【二：に】【時：じ】まで【荷：に】【物：もつ】を【預：あず】かってもらえますか。
sentence.rom: Ni-ji made nimotsu o azukatte moraemasu ka?
sentence.tr_en: Could you keep my luggage until 2 o'clock?
sentence.tr_de: Könnten Sie mein Gepäck bis zwei Uhr aufbewahren?

word.tr_en: to earn sth.; to obtain; to gain

sentence.s: 【私：わたし】はそれを【得：え】ようとしたがダメだった。
sentence.rom: Watashi wa sore o eyō to shita ga dame datta.
sentence.tr_en: I tried to get it, but it was in vain.
sentence.tr_de: Ich habe es zu erlangen versucht, aber es war vergeblich.

word.tr_en: to go mad; to lose one's mind; to malfunction
word.tr_de: den Verstand verlieren; nicht richtig funktionieren

sentence.s: この【機：き】【械：かい】 【狂：くる】ってる。
sentence.rom: Kono kikai kurutteru.
sentence.tr_en: This machine is malfunctioning.
sentence.tr_de: Diese Maschine funktioniert nicht richtig.

sentence.s: ギターの【調：ちょう】【子：し】が【狂：くる】っている。
sentence.rom: Gitā no chōshi ga kurutte iru.
sentence.tr_en: The tuning of the guitar is off.
sentence.tr_de: Die Gitarre ist verstimmt.

word.tr_en: to pay (fees); to bring to a close; to achieve (a result)

phrase.ph: 【成：せい】【功：こう】を【収：おさ】める
phrase.tr_en: to come out successful; to achieve success

word.tr_en: to groan; to moan; to snarl

sentence.s: 【虎：とら】の【唸：うな】り【声：ごえ】が【聞：き】こえる。
sentence.rom: Tora no unarigoe ga kikoeru.
sentence.tr_en: The growling of a tiger can be heard.
sentence.tr_de: Man kann das Knurren eines Tigers hören.

word.tr_en: to visit; to pay a visit to
word.rem: does not appear in GENKI2 index, nor in 500mon index; jisho has n4 for word and n3 for kanji

sentence.s: 【私：わたし】は【時：とき】【々：どき】 【友：とも】【達：だち】の【家：いえ】を【訪：たず】ねる。
sentence.rom: Watashi wa toki-doki tomodachi no ie o tazuneru.
sentence.tr_en: I pay a visit to my friend's house now and then.
sentence.tr_de: Ich besuche ab und zu das Haus meines Freundes.

word.tr_en: to desire; to wish for; to expect
to avoid; to ward off; to move out of the way
word.tr_de: etw. umgehen; etw. abwenden; etw. aus dem Weg gehen

word.tr_en: to let end; to get through with; to finish
word.tr_de: etw. enden lassen; etw. zu Ende bringen; etw. fertigstellen

word.tr_en: to fear; to be afraid of
to rescue from; to help out of; to save
word.tr_de: jem. von etwas befreien; jem. heraushelfen; jem. retten

word.tr_en: to lead to; to get through to
word.tr_de: zu etw. führen; zu etw. durchkommen

word.tr_en: to embrace; to hug; to hold in one's arms
to cross (e.g. road); to traverse
to count sth.; to enumerate
to drown; to lose one's head over sth.
word.tr_de: ertrinken; über etw. den Kopf verlieren

word.tr_en: to swap; to substitute; to change the object of one's focus
word.tr_de: vertauschen; austauschen; sich etw. anderem zuwenden

word.tr_en: to advise; to encourage; to urge
to leave; to go away; to send away
to suffer from (an illness, disease)
to cut (grass, hair, etc.); to trim
to stuff into; to pack

phrase.ph: 【服：ふく】をスーツケースに【詰：つ】める
phrase.tr_en: to pack clothes into a suitcase

phrase.ph: 【席：せき】を【詰：つ】める
【小：ちい】さな【車：くるま】に【詰：つ】め【込：こ】まれている
phrase.tr_en: to be crammed into a small car
phrase.tr_de: in ein kleines Auto gepackt sein
phrase.explanation_en: 詰め込む is stronger than just 詰める, meaning to stuff sth. into it.
phrase.explanation_de: 詰め込む ist stärker als bloss 詰める und bedeutet, etw. hineinstopfen.

sentence.s: 【席：せき】を【詰：つ】めてくれませんか。
sentence.rom: Seki o tsumete kuremasen ka?
sentence.tr_en: Could you make room for me?
sentence.tr_de: Könnten Sie für mich Platz machen?

word.tr_en: to lose interest in; to be fed up with
word.tr_de: das Interesse an etw. verlieren; etw. satt haben

word.tr_en: to discuss sth.; to talk about sth.
to suffer; to groan; to be worried
to surpass; to outstrip; to excel
